items.summary: Move the MindfulnessGuide section to the bottom of the pre-meditation setup phase layout, below all other controls.

In the MindfulnessGuide component, center the title at the top of its container. The title must read '[MeditationType] Meditation Guide' where [MeditationType] is the currently selected meditation type from the carousel (dynamic).
In the MindfulnessGuide component, move the 'More Details' button to the bottom center of its container.

On the pre-meditation setup phase, group the Duration slider (DurationRangeInput), Ambient Sound Picker (AmbientMusicCarousel), and the Begin/Save Ritual action buttons into a single unified container with consistent styling.

Extract the reflection phase JSX from PreMeditationPage into a standalone ReflectionPhase component (frontend/src/pages/ReflectionPage.tsx or frontend/src/components/ReflectionPhase.tsx). The component must accept as props all required state and callbacks: selectedType, duration, selectedMoods, handleMoodToggle, selectedEnergy, setSelectedEnergy, reflection, setReflection, isFavorite, setIsFavorite, handleSaveReflection, recordSession.isPending, createJournalEntry.isPending, and a navigate/onBack handler. The component renders: session complete header, mood selection grid, energy level selection grid, reflection textarea, favorite checkbox, and Save & Continue button. Replace the inline reflection phase block in PreMeditationPage with `<ReflectionPhase ... />`.
